tr_dobot_switch_control_dh: Control DH gripper (parameter1: width, range: 0~100; parameter2: force torque, range: 20~100; parameter3: speed, range: 1~100, Parameter 4: Optional parameter, table type, whether isBlock blocks subsequent program execution)
tr_dobot_switch_control_get_move_status_:
Get DH gripper current status,
 0: in motion, no object detected; 
 1: reached specified position, no object detected
 2: gripped object
 3: object dropped
tr_dobot_switch_control_get_init_status_:
Get DH gripper initialization status,
 -1: initialization uncompleted; 
 1: initialization completed
 2: initializing
tr_dobot_switch_control_get_err_code_dh: Get DH gripper error code(Each fault code corresponds to a different fault, please check the DH protocol document for details)
